column1: # Pisces Moon OS — Custom Partition Table
#   - No OTA partition: Pisces Moon is flashed via USB/PlatformIO.
#   - app0 at 9.94MB: maximized — every byte not needed by gamedata
#     or spiffs goes to firmware headroom. Current binary ~1.6MB (16%).

column3: and many future applications without ever

column1: #   - gamedata (5MB FAT): internal flash for fast game asset reads.
#     Doom shareware WAD (4.2MB) + SimCity terrain data live here.
#     Internal flash reads at ~80MB/s vs SD SPI at ~4-8MB/s — instant
#     level loads vs 1-2 second pause per map transition on SD.
#     Full doom2.wad (14.4MB) exceeds this — load from SD if owned.
#   - spiffs (1MB): minimal allocation. Nothing in Pisces Moon OS
#     currently writes to SPIFFS — all user data goes to SD card.
#     Kept at 1MB as emergency fallback if SD is absent.
